review_policy.promotion_rule: Review changed upstream references for reusable workflow lessons; do not copy third-party bodies, templates, resource lists, images, badges, or branding.

sources.role: Official Superpowers reference for execution discipline, planning, debugging, TDD, verification, and review workflows
Official Spec Kit reference for project constitution, specification-driven development, and strict durable-project workflow
Official OpenSpec reference for proposal-based change management and archived deltas
Official CodeGraph reference for code maps, symbol exploration, callers/callees, and impact analysis
Official Context7 reference for current library documentation lookup
Official Cowart reference for visual canvas, product flows, sketches, screenshots, and spatial design context
Official Figma Context MCP reference for design-file context, frames, components, and tokens
PM method reference for discovery, PRD, launch, pre-mortem, acceptance, and test-scenario structure
shadcn/ui ecosystem reference for examples, component options, and library discovery
Design taste reference for stricter visual judgment and anti-generic frontend quality calibration
Official UI/UX Pro Max skill reference for UX/design intelligence, pattern comparison, and design rationale
Official Anthropic frontend-design skill reference for distinctive, intentional frontend UI creation
Official GSAP skill reference for core tweens, timelines, ScrollTrigger, React/framework integration, plugins, utilities, and animation performance
Optional token and context compression reference for large tool outputs, logs, RAG chunks, files, reversible retrieval, and output shaping
